name: juftin
description: Open and refine pull requests with gitmoji titles, structured PR bodies, review response, and branch hygiene.

interface.shortDescription: Open and refine pull requests with gitmoji titles and structured PR bodies
interface.longDescription: Guides the agent through opening and refining pull requests: gitmoji title conventions, structured PR body template, responding to review feedback, and branch hygiene — following juftin's development constitution.
defaultPrompt: Open a PR for these changes
Update the PR with review feedback
